ItacPersonItem.Notes: On Capponi`s biography and cultural interests, see Gian Luigi Betti, `Giovan Battista Capponi: la “carriera della gloria” di un mago e scienziato nella Bologna del Seicento`, in L`Archiginnasio, (2006). Capponi was also member of the Parteni Academy in Bologna, Offuscati Academy in Cesena, Incolti Academy in Mirandola, and the Crusca Academy in Florence.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
